auth.title: DKV@Home Sign in
auth.description:
The DKV website processes the login code server-side – it must be intercepted BEFORE reaching the DKV server.

1) Press F12 → Network tab → Ctrl+Shift+P → type "block" → select "Show network request blocking".

2) Click "+" → enter https://my.dkv-mobility.com/dashboard* → press Enter.

3) Open the following login link:
{auth_url}

4) Sign in. The browser will show an error page ("blocked") – this is correct! The code has NOT been consumed.

5) Copy the URL from the address bar (contains ?code=…) and paste it here.

6) Remove the block: DevTools → "Network request blocking" → trash icon.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect DKV@Home
reauth_confirm.description:
The DKV website processes the login code server-side – it must be intercepted BEFORE reaching the DKV server.

1) Press F12 → Network tab → Ctrl+Shift+P → type "block" → select "Show network request blocking".

2) Click "+" → enter https://my.dkv-mobility.com/dashboard* → press Enter.

3) Open the following login link:
{auth_url}

4) Sign in. The browser will show an error page ("blocked") – this is correct! The code has NOT been consumed.

5) Copy the URL from the address bar (contains ?code=…) and paste it here.

6) Remove the block: DevTools → "Network request blocking" → trash icon.

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Make sure the dashboard URL was blocked in DevTools BEFORE opening the login link.
error.invalid_input: Invalid input. Please paste the full redirect URL (with ?code=…) or a refresh token (starts with 'eyJ').
error.invalid_redirect_url: No authorization code found in the URL. Please paste the full redirect URL.
error.unknown: Unknown error. Check the HA logs for details.
